title: Add column summaries to the portfolio table
excerpt: Add the ability to have summaries to columns for your entire portfolio

posts.author: dhurst (Dan Hurst)
posts.cookedHtml: Add the ability to have summaries to columns for your entire portfolio

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Dan,
One workaround maybe to reorganize your projects into individual item entries with subitems for tasks. By enabling the “Show summary on Parent item” setting for columns, you can roll up data from each project into summarized information on the parent item level

We develop custom solutions on Monday to help elevate your business. Reach out on farioconsulting.com
